title: Doctoral student in Intentional Monitoring of Agentic AI Software
department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering — Interaction Design and Software Engineering Division
funding: Funded (Swedish doctoral student salary scale, ~32k SEK/month start)
eligibility: MSc in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or AI Engineering
Preferred: experience with agentic AI systems (multiple AI models in coordination)
Preferred: background in conceptual modelling (UML, goal models, architectural models)
Preferred: technical writing and programming skills demonstrated
notes: Project sits at intersection of conceptual modelling + agentic AI. Jennifer Horkoff is a known requirements engineering / goal modelling researcher. Frame Nauval's Mini Digital Twin + LLM-Shipper-Profiles + mesa ABM as evidence of agentic + goal-driven system design.
